name: busy
documentation:
Busy
====

Personal time management for techies
------------------------------------

https://busy.wizlib.ca

modules.name: busy.storage
documentation: Had an idea for a pluggable data storage interface. For now FileStorage is
the only implementation.

classes.name: busy.storage.Storage
documentation: Abstract base class for Storage classes

classes.name: busy.integration.Integration
documentation:
Base class for integrations. Expected to implement sync and get
methods.

documentation: Return names of queues. Cache nothing.

documentation: Save any changes and clear the cache

documentation: Cast other types to datetime.date or None

functions.name: busy.util.date_util.relative_date
documentation: Given a string like "tomorrow" or "in 4 days", return a date
Refactored to only accept a string

functions.name: busy.util.date_util._match_today
documentation: The actual different types of expressions for relative dates.

methods.name: busy.util.checklist.Checklist.print

modules.name: busy.util.selector
documentation: Treat a collection as an in-memory database of Items, and this is the query
engine.
"Groups" create some degree of logic -- all the filters within a group are
OR'd with each other, then groups are AND'ed against other groups.

methods.name: busy.util.selector.Selector.__init__
documentation:
Receives filters as arguments and initializes the selector. The
sequence_number_ok parameter allows rejection of numeric (index-type)
filters.

methods.name: busy.util.selector.Selector.hit
documentation: Return true if the value at the index matches the criteria logic

methods.name: busy.util.selector.Selector.indices
documentation: Return the indices of the elements that match the criteria

classes.name: busy.util.selector.NamedCriterium
documentation: If it contains a colon, it's more than a tag

classes.name: busy.util.selector.FunctionCriterium
documentation:
Evaluates a function against the value (not the index) - not actualy
used?

classes.name: busy.command.print_command.PrintCommand
documentation: Generate a Checklist PDF

modules.name: busy.model.collection
documentation: An enhanced list of ITems

methods.name: busy.model.collection.Collection.__setattr__
documentation: Override list methods to make sure we've got Items of the right state.
There might be some methods missing here. Also set changed.

methods.name: busy.model.collection.Collection.selection
documentation:
Take 'filter' (such as tags, ranges of numbers, etc) and return tuples
of the indices and items selected. In other parts of the class and
subclasses, operations need to know what items to act on. A collection
that might contain multiple states doesn't allow sequence number
filters.
Methods related to selection and maniuplation by "filter"
Numbers in "filter" start with 1.

methods.name: busy.model.collection.Collection.items
documentation: Return the items for a set of indices

methods.name: busy.model.collection.Collection.replace
documentation:
Replace existing items at the select provided.

Also inserts if the indices run out. Does not create items; expects
them to already exist. Does not return anything since the calling code
already has the new items.

methods.name: busy.model.collection.Collection.delete
documentation: Remove the items at select and return them

methods.name: busy.model.collection.Collection.split
documentation: Return a tuple of items at indices and items not so

methods.name: busy.model.collection.Collection.write_items
documentation: Write all or a set of items to a file-like object

methods.name: busy.model.collection.SingleStateCollection.state_is_valid
documentation: Just the state check

methods.name: busy.model.collection.SingleStateCollection.read_items
documentation: Read all or a set of items from a file-like object

classes.name: busy.command.simple_command.SimpleCommand
documentation: Like base but with the tags

classes.name: busy.command.view_command.ViewCommand
documentation:
Output items using specified fields. Designed to replace base, describe,
simple, etc. Defaults to the top item. Outputs with space separation. Note
that blank lines will appear for any entry with no value.

documentation: Takes the name of an integration

classes.name: busy.command.list_command.ListCommand

Show the descriptions with selection numbers, default to all. Includes
summary output.

A data value for a given 1-letter key - indicted with % and the key.
Note there can only be one of each key in the description.

classes.name: busy.command.CollectionCommand
documentation: Base for commands that work on a user-specified collection

classes.name: busy.command.MultiCollectionCommand

methods.name: busy.command.MultiCollectionCommand.collection
documentation:
Return the collection object being queried, which could include
multiple states

Base for commands that work on an optional user-specified collection. If
no collection is specified, then numeric filters don't work and the command
must be read-only.
